functions.name: NewFlightModalContent
params:
{
  onClose,
  mode,
  seasonStart,
  seasonEnd,
  prefill,
  prefillLinked,
  prefillDateSelection,
  onSubmitSeasonal,
  onSubmitDetailed,
}

callGraph.callee:
[
    'LEG',
    type,
    operationalDate,
    row.rowIndex,
    safeIdPart(row.airline),
    safeIdPart(cleaned?.flightNumber ?? rawFlight),
    safeIdPart(route),
    safeIdPart(schedule),
    safeIdPart(row.aircraft),
  ].join

[
      'TRN_MANUAL',
      safeIdPart(arrRecord.airline),
      safeIdPart(arrRecord.rawFlightNumber),
      safeIdPart(depRecord.rawFlightNumber),
      safeIdPart(arrRecord.date),
      safeIdPart(arrRecord.id),
      safeIdPart(depRecord.id),
    ].join

[
    leg.type,
    leg.date,
    leg.airline,
    leg.rawFlightNumber,
    leg.route,
    leg.schedule,
    leg.aircraft,
    leg.category,
    leg.codeShares ?? '',
    leg.intDomInd ?? '',
  ].join

[
      leg.flightNumber,
      leg.rawFlightNumber,
      formatDailyScheduleDateTime(leg),
      leg.mct ?? '',
      leg.fb ?? '',
      leg.lb ?? '',
      leg.route,
      leg.aircraft,
      leg.category,
      leg.codeShares ?? '',
      leg.bhs ?? '',
      leg.ghs ?? '',
    ].join(' ').toLowerCase().includes

[
      leg.flightNumber,
      leg.rawFlightNumber,
      formatDailyScheduleDateTime(leg),
      leg.mct ?? '',
      leg.fb ?? '',
      leg.lb ?? '',
      leg.route,
      leg.aircraft,
      leg.category,
      leg.codeShares ?? '',
      leg.bhs ?? '',
      leg.ghs ?? '',
    ].join(' ').toLowerCase

[
      leg.flightNumber,
      leg.rawFlightNumber,
      formatDailyScheduleDateTime(leg),
      leg.mct ?? '',
      leg.fb ?? '',
      leg.lb ?? '',
      leg.route,
      leg.aircraft,
      leg.category,
      leg.codeShares ?? '',
      leg.bhs ?? '',
      leg.ghs ?? '',
    ].join

[
    now.getFullYear(),
    pad(now.getMonth() + 1),
    pad(now.getDate()),
    '_',
    pad(now.getHours()),
    pad(now.getMinutes()),
    pad(now.getSeconds()),
  ].join

[
    recordOperationalDate(record),
    record.type,
    record.airline,
    record.flightNumber,
    record.route,
    record.schedule,
  ].join

[
    leg.operationalDate,
    leg.type,
    leg.airline,
    leg.flightNumber,
    leg.updates.route ?? '',
    leg.schedule,
  ].join

[
    'DAILY_IMPORT',
    leg.type,
    safeIdPart(leg.operationalDate),
    safeIdPart(leg.flightNumber),
    safeIdPart(leg.updates.route ?? ''),
    safeIdPart(leg.schedule),
    safeIdPart(leg.aircraft),
  ].join

[
    ['id', record.id],
    ['linkId', record.linkId],
    ['type', record.type],
    ['airline', record.airline],
    ['flightNumber', record.flightNumber],
    ['rawFlightNumber', record.rawFlightNumber],
    ['route', record.route],
    ['schedule', record.schedule],
    ['date', record.date],
  ]
    .filter(([, value]) => typeof value !== 'string' || value.trim() === '')
    .map

[
    ['id', record.id],
    ['linkId', record.linkId],
    ['type', record.type],
    ['airline', record.airline],
    ['flightNumber', record.flightNumber],
    ['rawFlightNumber', record.rawFlightNumber],
    ['route', record.route],
    ['schedule', record.schedule],
    ['date', record.date],
  ]
    .filter

functions.name: buildGateRecordProjection
buildGateAllocationView
buildDailyStandGateModifications
params:
{
  row,
  record,
  field,
  value,
  settings,
  previousModifications,
}

callGraph.callee:
settings.standGateMappings
    .filter((mapping) => mapping.enabled)
    .sort((left, right) => left.sortOrder - right.sortOrder || left.id.localeCompare(right.id))
    .find

functions.name: renderGatePdfPageElement
params:
{
  preview,
  page,
  records,
  seasonCode,
  showBarLabels = true,
}

functions.name: calculateGatePdfScale
params:
{
  sourceWidthPx,
  sourceHeightPx,
  pageWidthMm = PDF_PAGE_WIDTH_MM,
  pageHeightMm = PDF_PAGE_HEIGHT_MM,
  marginMm = PDF_MARGIN_MM,
}

functions.name: buildGatePdfPreviewPlan
params:
{
  records,
  modifications,
  settings,
  range,
  selectedGroupIds,
  pixelsPerMinute = PDF_PIXELS_PER_MINUTE,
}

functions.name: exportGateAllocationPdf
params:
{
  records,
  modifications,
  settings,
  range,
  seasonCode,
  fileName,
  pixelsPerMinute = PDF_PIXELS_PER_MINUTE,
  selectedGroupIds,
}
